不细究的话书很好看   有原创小队友 女主大家长类型   叶寸心·小妹 新代号 亲情线可以，不油腻   微雷直接拿出药剂，和178章
最新310的小动物也是一个爽点","text_exts":[{"e":3,"s":0,"text":"火凤凰","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%81%AB%E5%87%A4%E5%87%B0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773993496DEF7113E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227598944765708878617%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227544377923428437054%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%81%AB%E5%87%A4%E5%87%B0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769270280,"group_id":"7544377923428437054","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看小说也能被举报！人之初，性本恶！！！荀子赢了，老子服了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwjowMTHI13MbMv6pCJwoT8UUhoUZnBMNi40+f9kui6P","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e273d461db804ce8bd5f2aa1542a6259~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533839&x-signature=IG%2FvHnmVqC%2BG5etqP2uWeAe7Vlc%3D","user_id":"2784434950513757","user_name":"果善被人欺的善良苹果"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2784434950513757","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1749223415,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#FFFFFF","can_worn":false,"id":17,"name":"击穿次元","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47c082300352c1a9e6e7669d207df6fb","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/57235e9992067573933a8f743e5f9044"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7544377923428437054","book_info":{"abstract":"叶苏然穿越到特种兵世界，被任命为火凤凰集训队总教官，觉醒全能教官系统。
让叶苏然没想到的是，这一世的他，竟然是张海燕的亲生女儿，叶寸心的姐姐.....
老狐狸郭德远：“雷神，你说一个女军官过来，担任总教官？这个女军官是什么来头？”
雷战：“具体是什么情况，我也不是很清楚。”
...
叶寸心：“姐姐，你怎么会在这里？”
...
田果：“啊？总教官是叶寸心的姐姐？”
何璐：“没想到我们的总教官，竟然是叶寸心的姐姐！！！”
沈兰妮：“我去~，难怪我取个代号，叶寸心这么激动。”
曲比阿卓：“叶寸心的亲姐姐？难怪之前就感觉她们两个有点像。”
